query: SELECT id, nickname, level, bp_constitution, bp_strength, bp_defense, bp_agility, bp_magic, (bp_constitution + bp_strength + bp_defense + bp_agility + bp_magic) as total_bp FROM game_player_pets ORDER BY total_bp DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT id, nickname, level, bp_constitution, bp_strength, bp_defense, bp_agility, bp_magic, (bp_constitution + bp_strength + bp_defense + bp_agility + bp_magic) as total_bp FROM game_player_pets ORDER BY total_bp DESC LIMIT 10;
